data.title: bn-31ct: fix channel click offset when scrolled
data.description:
Fix: channel click handler now accounts for channels_scroll offset.

The bug: clicking the 5th visible row in the channels list after scrolling would always select channel index 4 (the 5th channel overall) instead of the 5th *visible* channel (channels_scroll + 4).

Root cause: handle_mouse() calculated clicked_row from visual position (y - channels_area.y) without adding channels_scroll to convert from visual to logical index.

Fix: Added + self.channels_scroll to the clicked_row calculation in handle_mouse().

Risk: medium (user-visible behavior fix, single line change, no data impact).
